note: Promoted from iteration 3's convergence shadow. Fixed the last deep bug (cross-session lifecycle-id collision) + a self-introduced regression (chained-taxonomy false-positive) + cheap Suggestions.

fix_decisions.evidence: LOW. Both are denominator rows; rare (stop-attempts exists but unreadable). Distinct-reason nuance; parked.

step_3_5_gate.note: Verified I1 lifecycle composition correct (same-session preserved, cross-session distinct; join_confidence improved); I4 per-segment split; I5 regex; I2 breadcrumb ordering. Tests non-vacuous.

skipped_checks.reason: dirty tree at run time; runs clean in CI

phase3_findings.description: started_at producer/consumer mismatch: exporter folds run_started_at into job started_at, but analyzer guard+comment assume job-level-only (documented inaccuracy; disputed by final-pass as cosmetic — eligibility impact masked by completed_and_ran)
phase3_findings.calibration: comment-inaccuracy is real+cheap -> fixed as J1; the severe over-count claim is masked by completed_and_ran (a cancelled job is admitted via completed_and_ran regardless of started_at)

phase3_findings.description: terminal classification ignores is_error=False (reliable success signal), depends on rare 'exit code N' stdout string -> quiet successes dropped, noisy successes mislabeled RESULT_MISSING, candidate over-count
phase3_findings.calibration: SINGLE-SOURCE, disputed: final-pass praised the classifier as a STRENGTH and found no Important; code-reviewer+comment-analyzer clean. Impacts bounded by conservative/advisory candidate framing. A deep RESULT_MISSING/candidate-semantics redesign, NOT a surgical fix -> PARKED as advisory for the author (see final report).

phase3_findings.description: quote-unaware segment split: 'git commit -m "... && pytest"' -> false verification
malformed cloud_mappings signaled only via ephemeral stderr, not the durable artifact

shadow.reviewer_disagreement: SPLIT PANEL: final-pass 'Ready to merge, no Critical/Important'; code-reviewer clean; comment-analyzer clean (no falsehoods). Only type-design (J1) and SFH (is_error) raised Important, both single-source and disputed by final-pass. Over-grade gate applied: J1's comment-inaccuracy fixed (bounded); is_error calibrated to advisory (single-source, disputed, deep redesign, bounded impact).
shadow.over_grade_gate: is_error finding flagged as suspected over-grade (single-source from an empirical over-grader SFH, contradicted by final-pass's explicit 'strength' assessment, impact bounded by conservative candidate framing). Recorded technical evaluation: it is a real accuracy IMPROVEMENT to the terminal/missing split, but not a blocking bug, and the fix is a candidate-semantics redesign beyond a surgical change. Calibrated to advisory; surfaced to the author.
